description_long: This is a mid-rise office building with a rectangular footprint, featuring five visible floors and a flat roof. The facade is primarily composed of light gray and white materials, with horizontal bands of windows that are evenly spaced and consistent across each floor. One side of the building includes a prominent vertical section with dark-tinted glass or paneling, likely housing an elevator shaft or stairwell. The ground level includes a recessed entryway and a small overhang, suggesting a main entrance for foot traffic. The surrounding area is paved, with a driveway or access road wrapping around the building, and the structure sits on a raised platform or plinth. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality.
description: A modern, five-story office building with a flat roof, light gray facade, and regular horizontal window bands. The structure features a prominent vertical glass section and a recessed main entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with horizontal window bands and the primary entrance area, as well as the surrounding paved driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, the vertical shaft structure, and the regular window arrangement along the side.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate side view displaying the vertical glass or panel section, recessed entry, and additional facade details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's length, window bands, and the continuation of the paved access road.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal bands of rectangular windows, evenly spaced and repeated across all floors.
